label: Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification

node.label: Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification
node.definition: Distillation transfers behavior from a teacher to a smaller student, while pruning removes low-value weights, channels, heads, experts, or activations.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification is to connect Supervised learning, Calibration, uncertainty & risk objectives to downstream capabilities including Quantized inference & compressed deployment, Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment.
examples: substrate for Quantized inference & compressed deployment
substrate for Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Calibration, uncertainty & risk objectives.

dependencies.rationale: Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification uses Supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Calibration, uncertainty & risk objectives.
Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification uses Affine transforms & dense layers as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
